answer:
Goriot is poor because he has bankrupted himself to support his two well-married daughters, giving them his entire fortune. His daughters, Delphine and Anastasie, continually exploit his money and neglect him in return. Ultimately, he dies in poverty and despair, abandoned by the daughters he sacrificed everything for.

\boxed{\text{Goriot bankrupted himself to support his two daughters, who then abandoned him.}}
